channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sponsor invite Akie Iwai leads the LPGA Thailand golf tournament by 3 strokes after 10-under 62
item.description: PATTAYA, Thailand (AP) — Akie Iwai made the best of a sponsor's invite to shoot a 10-under 62 and lead by three strokes after the first round of the LPGA's Thailand tournament at Siam Country Club's Pattaya Old Course.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks’ top goalie prospect leaves San Jose Barracuda game with injury
item.description: San Jose Barracuda goalie Yaroslav Askarov left Wednesday night’s game against the Ontario Reign in the first period
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Hornets stun Lakers 100-97 after Luka struggles and LeBron misses 2 late shots to tie it
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Miles Bridges scored 29 points, LaMelo Ball added 27 and the Charlotte Hornets stunned LeBron James and Luka Doncic with a 100-97 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Missouri coach Dennis Gates takes PA microphone to head off court-storming celebration
item.description: After Missouri basketball fans stormed the court following a victory over then-No. 1 Kansas on Dec. 8, Tigers coach Dennis Gates made sure there wouldn’t be an encore after No. 15 Missouri beat No. 4 Alabama 110-98 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Utah State blasts San Jose State, 105-57
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team got back on track following Sunday's heartbreaking loss to New Mexico with a resounding beatdown over San Jose State Wednesday night, 105-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 1 Auburn overcomes a rough offensive performance to beat Arkansas 67-60
item.description: Johni Broome had 16 points and 13 rebounds and No. 1 Auburn overcame a rough offensive performance to beat Arkansas 67-60 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penn State bucks skid, tops Nebraska 89-72
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK, Pa. (AP) — Yanic Konan Niederhauser and Zach Hicks each scored 19 points, D’Marco Dunn added 17 and Penn State routed Nebraska 89-72 on Wednesday night to end a seven-game losing streak. Penn State (14-13, 4-12 Big Ten) won its first game since topping Rutgers 80-72 on Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: PHL 17

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Girls Soccer: San Marcos 2, Cathedral 2
item.description: A tight battle between regional powers in the Open Division of girls soccer between San Marcos and Cathedral.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Chargers to play 2025 regular season opener in Brazil
item.description: The Eagles and Packers traveled to South America to compete in the first-ever NFL game in South America. The league will return to the continent in September.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NHL legend Bobby Hull had CTE when he died, researchers say
item.description: Bobby Hull, who spent 23 seasons playing professional hockey, suffered from Stage 2 CTE at the time of his death in 2023, researchers say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brewers owner poses shocking question about what his job is
item.description: Milwaukee Brewers owner Mark Attanasio posed a shocking question about what his job is as owner of the team before spring training games began.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mbappé hat trick for Real Madrid dumps Man City out of Champions League. PSG and Dortmund advance
item.description: Kylian Mbappé scored a hat trick, Erling Haaland stayed on the bench injured and Real Madrid dumped Manchester City out of the Champions League on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NASCAR deals Daytona 500 pole winner massive fine for 2nd consecutive year
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Daytona 500 pole-winner Chase Briscoe was dealt a major penalty Wednesday when NASCAR said Joe Gibbs Racing had a modified spoiler on the No. 19 Toyota in time trials. Joe Gibbs Racing was docked 100 driver/owner points and 10 playoff points.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFL punter arrested after 'MAGA' plaque protest during California city council meeting
item.description: Former Minnesota Vikings punter Chris Kluwe was arrested and carried out of a Huntingon Beach City Council meeting while protesting a library sign that spelled out "MAGA.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Seven Chilean men are charged with burglarizing the homes of Mahomes, Burrow and other star athletes
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Seven men from Chile have been charged in Florida federal court with orchestrating burglaries at the homes of prominent professional athletes around the country, according to a criminal complaint.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Wisconsin bans trans athletes from girls' sports, following Trump's executive order
item.description: Wisconsin's high school athletics association announced Wednesday it is banning trans athletes from girls' sports in order to comply with Trump's recent order.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: With the Dodgers' organization watching, Roki Sasaki has some success throwing live batting practice
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Even in practice, Japanese phenom Roki Sasaki draws a crowd. The 23-year-old threw 27 pitches over two innings of live batting practice on Wednesday in front of hundreds of fans and several teammates.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bears announce 10% average increase to 2025 season-ticket packages
item.description: CHICAGO — Bears season-ticket holders will see an average price increase of 10% for their 2025 ticket packages, team President and CEO Kevin Warren announced.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Learn a few laundry secrets from the baseball pros
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — From the pinstripes of New York all the way to the Dodger blues of Los Angeles, there is a strong connection among the clubhouse staffers who wash the dirt-caked, hard-worn uniforms of the major leagues. Just like the players who wear the jerseys.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Researchers confirm Hall of Famer Bobby Hull had CTE when he died 2 years ago
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Bobby Hull, the Hall of Fame forward and two-time NHL MVP who helped the Chicago Blackhawks win the Stanley Cup in 1961, had chronic traumatic encephalopathy when he died two years ago, his widow said in a statement released on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Right-hander Nick Pivetta, Padres finalize $55M four-year contract
item.description: Right-hander Nick Pivetta and the San Diego Padres officially announced a finalized $55 million, four-year contract on Monday, a backloaded deal that allows him to opt out after the 2026 and '27 seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Shaq's OGs win the 1st NBA All-Star mini-tournament, topping Chuck's Global Stars 41-25 in the final
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The winning total last year: 211 points. The winning total this year: 41 points. An All-Star Game like none other — since it was three games, not one — still had plenty of flash and not a lot of fire.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump takes laps on Daytona 500 speedway in The Beast
item.description: “This is your favorite president,” Trump said. “I’m a big fan. I’m a really big fan of you people. How you do this, I don’t know. But I just want you to be safe.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 58, Victory Christian Academy 44
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in Chula Vista on Tuesday night with Montgomery defeating Victory Christian Academy 58-44. Aztecs were lead by Senior JJ Sanchez. Montgomery was down at half and got going in the 2nd half for the double digit win.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: The new NBA All-Star format is here, and Sunday night will show whether it works
item.description: This will be an actual All-Star matchup. On one side, there's a team with 86 combined All-Star selections, $2.7 billion in on-court earnings and where every single player on the team is either an NBA champion, an Olympic gold medalist, or both.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Warriors kick off 2025 season next week
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - About to begin its eighth season in Major League Rugby, the Utah Warriors are out to improve upon last year's 5-11 record. "I think we do really well this year," said fullback Sione Mahe.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Countdown to the 2025 Daytona 500: Drivers get ready for season opener
item.description: The biggest race in NASCAR is only a few days away, where 40 drivers will compete to win “The Great American Race.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WGN 9
